notes: Current model CULCDCHUM9001 (marketed as 'V 2.0'). Mist output adjustable via manual knob only; no integrated hygrostat, setpoint or auto-restart confirmed by manufacturer. Noise 35 dBA at 3 m from hydroponics.eu. Runtime 16h calculated at min output (4000 ml / 250 ml/h); manufacturer states 7-12h for V 2.0 variant at higher outputs.
